user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — noise suppression (the correct, fail-safe direction after the reverted gem-surfacing). Broadcast/recruiting/automated senders (roman@expert.micro1.ai; entity trust_class junk/transactional) were becoming 'High-value relationship at risk' candidates — the 95% noise the Bible says to suppress. Fix: getEntityRejectionReasons (lib/briefing/discrepancy-detector.ts) now rejects an entity when trust_class is junk/transactional, or its email/name matches automated/recruiting/marketing-sender patterns. Real-data validated: roman(junk)+support@micro1.ai(transactional)+rahul@micro1.ai(domain) rejected; julieta@micro1.io(trusted) preserved. Fails safe (worst case = more silence, never more noise). Deterministic test in tests/briefing/__tests__/broadcast-sender-rejection.test.ts; live/paid validation is the owner gate.
allowed_files_raw: Broadcast-sender suppression: the entity admission gate in discrepancy-detector.ts + its deterministic test + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, schema, or deps. Only the named brain file.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/briefing/__tests__/broadcast-sender-rejection.test.ts && npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/discrepancy-detector.test.ts && npm run typecheck
required_product_proof: OWNER live/paid validation: run a generation cycle and confirm recruiting/broadcast senders (roman/micro1) no longer surface as relationship candidates, and real contacts still do. PR is NOT self-merged.
required_browser_proof: N/A — backend entity-admission logic; product proof is the live generation run.
acceptance_condition: getEntityRejectionReasons rejects junk/transactional + automated/recruiting-domain senders and preserves trusted humans (broadcast-sender-rejection.test.ts green); discrepancy-detector suite + typecheck green; gate:continuity passes; finding recorded in #445; PR opened for owner validation, not self-merged.
anti_regression_checks: broadcast-sender-rejection test green (roman/micro1 rejected, julieta/real-human preserved)
discrepancy-detector suite 111 green + typecheck clean; only discrepancy-detector.ts changed under lib/
stop_condition: Stop when the PR is open with deterministic + real-data proof, left for owner live validation (not self-merged).
next_command: Owner: validate live (recruiting/broadcast senders gone from candidates, real contacts kept), then merge. Follow-up lever: the two-way test (require the user replied at least once) for an even more robust relationship filter.
